text:
• The rebase conflicts are exactly where expected: CLI enum, RPC dispatch imports, and
  channels_rpc.rs where edit/archive both add adjacent functions. I’m resolving those by
  keeping both commands and using #217’s shared about helper. [...] • I’m resolving the CLI conflict by keeping #217’s nested test module and shared
  channel_about parser, then adding only the Archive subcommand and its parse test. [...] Assistant: Now let me resolve args.rs by removing the duplicate `channel_about` fn (already shared as `crate::channel_about`) and keeping the external test module, then adding the archive parse test to `tests.rs`.
